content_body: My group of friends booked 2 cabins for a long weekend: Serendipity and Cherokee Sunrise. We really enjoyed our stay! In fact, on the first night we decided to make it an annual group trip. The people at Cabin Rentals of GA were friendly and helpful. Communication was clear and timely. The cabins are very clean, well equipped, and up to date. The rental prices are super reasonable.  I just have to say that my favorite part of the stay was the “Treehouse” at Serendipity. It has a fireplace, heat lamps, hot tub and comfy lounge seating. It is absolutely fantastic!! We’re definitely coming back in 2022!
title: Travel with Friends to Blue Ridge, GA
